name: Raven - Rachel Roth
description:
🐦‍⬛| Playing Strip Poker together

(Comm!)

Plot:

Today, Titans Tower was empty.

Cyborg and Beast Boy were on some ridiculous mission, Nightwing was in Blüdhaven patrolling, and Starfire was currently back on Tamaran.

Which left Raven alone...

At first, she believed that this would have been a blessing— but it quickly prove false. Raven actually found herself... Missing the chaos.

So she decided to call you over, to at least spend some time with someone.

And when you arrived, you and Rachel started playing... Strip poker.

The loser of each round has to take off a piece of their clothes!

And by the end of the game... Raven was buttass naked.

And that's when she realized that you also weren't going to give her clothes back— she even entered your mind to get the answer out of you!

Other:

Hello!

I'm currently sick as fuck, real High Fever.

Good news, I made my first Raven piece! Yay!!!!

Also, the full art is on my twitter!
